overall.description: Third-person gameplay footage of a character in a long coat walking through a moody, stormy riverside landscape at night. The character travels from an elevated path down to a reed-lined shore, pauses on a rocky outcrop to survey the water, then continues through grassy fields toward a distant gothic castle.

scene_state.functional_zone: elevated dirt path beside stone wall

agents.ego_description: walking steadily along elevated dirt path beside a stone wall with river visible to the right

entered.detail: rough stone wall running alongside the path
narrow dirt trail elevated above the river
wide river flowing through the valley
gothic castle with spires visible through the mist
dense trees forming a canopy over the path

segments.scene_description: The character walks along an elevated dirt path bordered by a stone wall on the left and overlooking a river to the right. Overhanging trees create a canopy overhead while a gothic castle is visible in the far distance through the mist.

events.description: descends from elevated path into tall grass approaching the riverbank

agents.ego_description: moving down from the path through tall grass toward the river's edge

entered.detail: tall green grass surrounding the character
sandy riverbank at the water's edge
dense stands of tall reeds along the shore

segments.scene_description: Leaving the elevated path behind, the character descends through dense tall grass toward the riverbank, transitioning from dirt trail to grassy terrain as the river draws closer.

events.description: mountain peak becomes visible through the mist in the distance

agents.ego_description: walking along the sandy shore between dense stands of tall reeds and the river water

entered.detail: misty mountain peak visible in the distance
weathered wooden posts among the reeds

segments.scene_description: The character proceeds along a sandy riverbank flanked by dense tall reeds. A misty mountain emerges in the distant background while wooden posts mark the edge of the shore.

scene_state.functional_zone: rocky river outcrop with open views

events.description: character slows to walk carefully on rocky terrain
moonlight breaks through clouds illuminating the water surface

agents.ego_description: walking slowly on rocky outcrop surveying the river and landscape, occasionally looking up at the sky

entered.detail: dark rocky promontory extending into the river

segments.scene_description: Standing on a rocky outcrop jutting into the river, the character moves slowly while surveying the landscape. The sky opens up overhead revealing moonlight breaking through storm clouds and reflecting on the water's surface.

events.description: turns away from river and walks inland through grassy field

agents.ego_description: walking away from the river through an open grassy field toward the distant castle

entered.detail: open field of green grass with scattered white flowers
dark tree line on the horizon

segments.scene_description: Turning away from the river, the character walks through an open grassy field dotted with flowers. The gothic castle remains visible in the distance to the right while a dark forest looms on the left horizon.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous camera movement from an elevated riverside path down to a moonlit shore and across an open field toward a distant gothic castle. It begins with the character walking along a dirt path bordered by a stone wall and overhanging trees, with the castle faintly visible through the mist. As the character leaves the trail, the camera descends through dense tall grass toward the riverbank, transitioning into a sandy shore flanked by tall reeds and wooden posts. The scene then shifts to a rocky outcrop jutting into the water, where the storm clouds break to reveal moonlight reflecting on the river's surface. Finally, the camera turns away from the water to follow the character through a flowered grassy field, positioned between a looming dark forest and the distant gothic spires.
